title: Code Review Template
scenario: Generate a code review template for a team of developers. The template should include a clear description of the code, the purpose of the review, and a set of questions to help reviewers assess the code. The output should be in the format of a Markdown table.
constraints: The output should be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the template is customizable and is under 50 lines of code
Check if the Markdown table is correctly formatted
Check if the questions are clear and relevant
